text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: Y = credit received 
N = no credit received 

COMMENT: If any claim that comprises the Stay has a value code (CLM-VAL-CD) equal to 'FD' populate the MEDPAR 
Credit Received from Manufacturer for Replaced Medical Device Switch with a 'Y'. If no 'FD' value code, 
populate field with an 'N'.
